task_completion.description: SolveSpace application is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace GUI is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The base block of the battery holder is modeled with dimensions 44x71x21 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D rectangular block is visible in the SolveSpace viewport. Constraints or dimension labels showing 44, 71, and 21 should be visible in the sketch or property panel during the modeling process.

task_completion.description: An internal pocket is modeled with dimensions 40x67x19 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A hollowed-out rectangular pocket is visible inside the base block. Constraints or dimension labels showing 40, 67, and 19 should be visible during the sketching or extrusion process.

task_completion.description: A central separator rib is modeled with dimensions 2x67x10 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A thin rib dividing the pocket into two sections is visible. Constraints or dimension labels showing 2, 67, and 10 should be visible during its creation.

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the specified .slvs path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar shows '18650_holder.slvs', or a save dialog/file manager shows the file in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

task_completion.description: The 3D triangle mesh is exported to the specified .stl path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog shows '18650_holder.stl' being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/', or a file manager shows the .stl file in the directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to model the object.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks and interactions with SolveSpace menus, toolbars, and viewport, rather than terminal commands generating the files.

integrity.description: The model was built from scratch in SolveSpace.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the step-by-step creation of sketches, constraints, and extrusions in the SolveSpace history panel or viewport, rather than just importing a pre-made file.

integrity.description: The STL file was exported via SolveSpace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Export Triangle Mesh' (or similar) dialog in SolveSpace is used to save the .stl file, rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo'.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected .slvs path: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/18650_holder.slvs
Expected .stl path: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/18650_holder.stl
Expected dimensions: Base block (44x71x21 mm), internal pocket (40x67x19 mm), and separator rib (2x67x10 mm).
